positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic golden retriever silhouette standing playfully in a field of oversized, stylized daisies. The background should feature a soft, pastel gradient blend of sky blue and warm yellow, with minimalistic wispy clouds. Use a clean, highly contrasting art style inspired by modern mid-century modern graphic design. The composition must be centrally focused, with the dog and flowers forming a clean, easily visible graphic emblem suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong black and gold outlines should define the silhouettes, giving it a sticker or patch-like aesthetic. Studio lighting, vector art precision, ultra-detailed, perfect symmetry.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blur, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, out-of-focus, poorly drawn limbs, bad anatomy, extra fingers, noise, low detail, messy background, realistic textures, cartoonish
